inline_comments.message:
This is not RESTFul design.
APIs usually don't have verbs in the URL.
POST is the VERB to create and DELETE is the verb to delete. They should just hit the same endpoint.
/v1/writer should be the endpoint with POST to create and DELETE on /v1/writer/{writer-name} to delete.

Also, URLs should be lower case. Camel case is not recommended here.
